result:
Build is fully green. Summary of changes:

- `src/drivers/driver.h`: replaced `int qual; int noise;` in `struct wpa_scan_res` with `struct { int qual; int noise; } sig;`, updated doc comment.
- Updated all call sites accessing `wpa_scan_res`'s qual/noise: `wpa_supplicant/scan.c`, `wpa_supplicant/bss.c`, `wpa_supplicant/events.c`, `src/drivers/driver_bsd.c`, `src/drivers/driver_nl80211_scan.c`, `src/drivers/driver_wext.c` — all changed to `->sig.qual` / `->sig.noise`.
- Left `struct wpa_bss`'s own `qual`/`noise` fields (in `wpa_supplicant/bss.h`, used by `ctrl_iface.c` and `dbus_old_handlers.c`) and the unrelated `iw_quality`/`iwstats` struct usages in `driver_wext.c` untouched, since those are separate structs, not `wpa_scan_res`.

`make` in `wpa_supplicant/` completed with a full clean rebuild and linked `wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, and `wpa_passphrase` successfully.
